title: Vintage USA porn: 'A Summer Fantasy' 1982
tags: Description from the publicity: Deep into the fantasy life of blond surfer Scott Nichols drifts this dreamy early '80s Mark Reynolds film! For a day and night, nothing else mattered to Southern California's beach boys as time stood still and sex became more important than surf. As one young man lazes about in the heat, visions come to him of five of his incredibly hot surf buddies discovering him and each other as they learn that the ocean isn't the only place to ride the big one! Sex scenes consist of solos, duos, and group action. Produced by Nova Studio's Warren Stephens, this well-made, sensual classic features strong production values, excellent music selections, and a great cast of sexy young men.
